title: Do not increase accessibility of record fields via reflection
description: Using reflection to increase the accessibility of record fields undermines Java's encapsulation and can lead to unexpected behavior or security issues. This rule ensures that record fields remain protected as intended by the language design.
recommendation: Do not use reflection to change the accessibility of record fields. Access fields only through their intended public API.

checks.message: Do not use reflection to change the accessibility of record fields. Access fields only through their intended public API.
